_comment: Stage metadata for CMIP6 automation. Used by cron to seed stub files.

13.label: NCC + CMCC

models.brief: CAM6-Nor atmosphere (T85L32, ~2deg) + CLM5 + MICOM ocean. Fork of CESM2.1. No interactive chemistry.
As NorESM2-LM, higher resolution (~1deg). All forcing identical.
CAM5.3 atmosphere (T85L46, ~1deg) + NEMO3.6 ocean + CICE4 + CLM4.5 land. AOGCM.
CMCC-CM2-SR5 base + CLM5 land BGC (active C-N) + COBALT ocean BGC. Full ESM.

13.key_prior_finding: NorESM2 O=LIKELY-deviant: Keeble 2021 Stage3 verbatim names NorESM2 alongside CESM2/FV2 as using CESM2-WACCM-derived ozone — test and confirm.

14.label: CSIRO + CSIRO-ARCCSS

models.brief: UM GA7.1 atmosphere (N96L85, ~135km) + NEMO3.6 + CICE5 + CABLE2.0 land. AOGCM. Shares GA7.1 with HadGEM3-GC31-LL.
UM GA1.0 atmosphere (N96L38, lower top) + NEMO3.2 + CABLE2.4-CN land BGC + WOMBAT ocean BGC. Full ESM.

14.key_prior_finding: ACCESS-CM2 uses UM GA7.1 (same as HadGEM3-GC31-LL Stage11) — test if O/aerosol/SO/VL stack is identical to HadGEM3-GC31-LL.

15.label: AWI + INM

models.brief: ECHAM6.3 atmosphere (T63L47, ~190km) + FESOM2.0 ocean (unstructured). Same atm as MPI-ESM1-2-LR.
As AWI-CM-1-1-LR but higher ocean resolution. All forcing expected identical.
AWI-CM-1-1 base + REcoM2 ocean BGC. ESM inputs: Fe-dep, CO2-mode.
INM atmosphere (2deg x1.5deg, L21 top ~10hPa, LOW MODEL TOP) + INMOM ocean (0.5deg). Russian model.
INM atmosphere (2deg x1.5deg, L73 top ~0.2hPa, HIGHER TOP than CM4-8) + INMOM ocean (0.5deg). Russian model.

15.key_prior_finding: AWI-CM uses ECHAM6.3 (same as MPI-ESM1-2-LR Stage8: O=CCMI-std, MACv2-SP aerosols) — test if AWI-CM shares that forcing stack.

16.label: CAS + FIO-QLNM + NUIST

models.brief: IAP AGCM5 atmosphere + CoLM4 land + LICOM3 ocean + CICE4. Chinese Academy of Sciences.
FAMIL3 atmosphere (C96, ~100km) + CoLM land + LICOM3 ocean + CICE6. CAS/LASG.
GAMIL3 atmosphere (2deg) + CLM4 land + LICOM3 ocean + CICE6. CAS/LASG.
FOAM atmosphere (based on CAM5.3) + POP2 ocean + MASNUM wave model + CICE5 + CLM4.5 land. Chinese FIO.
ECHAM6.3 atmosphere (T63L47) + CLM4.5 land + NEMO3.4 ocean + CICE4.1. Uses ECHAM6.3 same as MPI/AWI.

16.key_prior_finding: NESM3 uses ECHAM6.3 (same as MPI-ESM1-2-LR and AWI-CM) — likely O=CCMI std and MACv2-SP aerosols. FIO-ESM-2-0 based on CAM5.3 may share CEDS+BB4CMIP6 aerosol stack.

17.label: THU + SNU + AS-RCEC + KIOST + CCCR-IITM + UA

models.brief: CIESM atmosphere (CAM5-family, T85L30) + MOM6 ocean + CICE6 + CLM4.5 land. Tsinghua University.
CAM5-UniCon atmosphere (T85L30) + POP2 ocean + CICE4 + CLM4.5. Seoul National Univ. Based on CESM1.3 framework.
TaiESM1 atmosphere (based on CAM5.3/CESM1.3, T85L30) + POP2 ocean + CICE4 + CLM4. Academia Sinica, Taiwan.
KIOST atmosphere (based on HadGEM2-AO, N96L38) + NEMO3.6 ocean + TOPAZ4 ocean BGC. Korea Institute of Ocean Science.
IITM atmosphere (based on SPEEDY model, T30L18, COARSE) + MOM4p1 ocean + TOPAZ2 ocean BGC + CLM land. Indian Institute of Tropical Meteorology.
Very simple model (MCM = Minimum Complexity Model, T21L20) + MOM5 ocean. University of Arizona. Simple/idealized forcings expected.

17.key_prior_finding: TaiESM1 and SAM0-UNICON based on CAM5/CESM lineage; KIOST-ESM based on HadGEM2-AO (old UM GA1 family, different from GA7.1 used by HadGEM3-GC31-LL/ACCESS-CM2). MCM-UA-1-0 is a minimal model — may use simplified/fixed forcings.
